title: Sunflower Spice Crumble
description: A salty, crumbly snack that pairs sunflower oil with bhuna spices for a post-workout polish dish.

ingredients.name: 1/4 cup bhuna masala blend
ingredients.notes: A mix of spices including cumin, coriander, turmeric, and chili powder.

ingredients.name: 1/2 cup almond flour or coconut flour
ingredients.notes: Substitute with almond meal for a smoother texture if desired.

instructions: In a small bowl, mix together the sunflower oil and bhuna masala blend.
Stir in the salt and black pepper to taste. The spice mixture should be quite dry.
Gradually add the flour while continuing to mix until you achieve your desired consistency—crumbly but not too dry.
